mapper.insert: INSERT INTO manager_dayoff (manager_id, `date`, dayoff_type, status) VALUES (#{managerId}, #{date}, #{type}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, manager_id, `date`, dayoff_type, status FROM manager_dayoff WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE manager_dayoff SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT md.id, md.manager_id, md.`date`, md.dayoff_type, md.status FROM manager_dayoff md JOIN manager m ON m.id = md.manager_id WHERE m.store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY md.id DESC
SELECT id, manager_id, `date`, dayoff_type, status FROM manager_dayoff ORDER BY id DESC
